2603.18925.title: Improving moment tensor solutions under Earth structure uncertainty with simulation-based inference
2603.18925.paper_summary: Bayesian inference represents a principled way to incorporate Earth structure uncertainty in full-waveform moment tensor inversions, but traditional approaches generally require significant approximations that risk biasing the resulting solutions. We introduce a robust method for handling theory errors using simulation-based inference (SBI), a machine learning approach that empirically models their impact on the observations. This framework retains the rigour of Bayesian inference while avoiding restrictive assumptions about the functional form of the uncertainties. We begin by demonstrating that the common Gaussian parametrisation of theory errors breaks down under minor ($1-3 \%$) 1-D Earth model uncertainty. To address this issue, we develop two formalisms for utilising SBI to improve the quality of the moment tensor solutions: one using physics-based insights into the theory errors, and another utilising an end-to-end deep learning algorithm. We then compare the results of moment tensor inversion with the standard Gaussian approach and SBI, and demonstrate that Gaussian assumptions induce bias and significantly under-report moment tensor uncertainties. We also show that these effects are particularly problematic when inverting short period data and for shallow, isotropic events. On the other hand, SBI produces more reliable, better calibrated posteriors of the earthquake source mechanism. Finally, we successfully apply our methodology to two well studied moderate magnitude earthquakes: one from the 1997 Long Valley Caldera volcanic earthquake sequence, and the 2020 Zagreb earthquake.
2603.18925.paper_summary_zh: 貝葉斯推斷代表了一種原則性的方法，用於在全波形矩張量反演中納入地球結構的不確定性，但傳統方法通常需要重大近似，這可能會使得結果解產生偏差。我們介紹了一種使用基於模擬的推斷（SBI）來處理理論誤差的穩健方法，這是一種通過實證模型化其對觀測影響的機器學習方法。這一框架保持了貝葉斯推斷的嚴謹性，同時避免了對不確定性功能形式的限制性假設。我們首先展示了理論誤差的常見高斯參數化在輕微（$1-3 \%$）的一維地球模型不確定性下的失效。為了解決這個問題，我們開發了兩種形式主義，利用SBI來提高矩張量解的質量：一種是基於物理的理論誤差見解，另一種是利用端到端深度學習算法。我們然後比較了矩張量反演的結果，使用標準高斯方法和SBI，並展示了高斯假設會引入偏差並顯著低報矩張量的不確定性。我們還顯示這些影響在反演短週期數據和淺層各向同性事件時特別成問題。另一方面，SBI產生了更可靠、更好校準的地震源機制後驗分佈。最後，我們成功地將我們的方法應用於兩個研究良好的中等規模地震：一個來自1997年長谷火山地震序列，另一個是2020年薩格勒布地震。
2603.18925.author: A. A. Saoulis et.al.
2603.18925.authors: A. A. Saoulis, T. -S. Pham, A. M. G. Ferreira
